data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Access Controls
data.description: Strict access controls to limit data access to authorized personnel only.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control integrated with Google Identity services.

data.title: Security Monitoring
data.description: Real-time monitoring to identify and respond to threats promptly.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google’s Threat Intelligence and Security Command Center.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust defenses against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud Armor and advanced traffic filtering mechanisms.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and patch management processes.
data.technical_spec: Continuous scanning with Google’s security tools and manual code reviews.
